LandingPage.metaDescription: Free World Cup 2026 score predictions with friends — bragging rights, leaderboards, and private groups. No real-money wagering.

hero.subtitle: Bragging rights, not bankrolls. Make score picks with friends for the 2026 World Cup — create a group and climb the leaderboard.
hero.safeBadge: For fun only — no real-money wagering

step1.title: Create your group
step1.description: Choose a name, customize colors, and scoring rules.

step2.title: Predict the scores
step2.description: Lock in your picks before kickoff. Peek at odds or AI suggestions for a second opinion.

step3.title: Climb the leaderboard
step3.description: Earn points for every correct call. Who will be number one?

leaderboard.title: Live leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Watch rankings update as matches finish.

odds.title: Market context
odds.description: See how bookmakers frame the match — context for your picks, not for staking.

ai.title: AI predictions
ai.description: Glance at model scores before you commit.

groups.title: Public & private groups
groups.description: Invite-only rooms or discover open leagues.

rules.title: Custom scoring rules
rules.description: Tune points for results, exact scores, and bonuses.

mobile.title: Mobile optimized
mobile.description: Predict from the stands or the sofa.

stats.title: 48 nations. One trophy. Endless bragging.
stats.body: For the first time, 48 nations will compete. More matches, more predictions, more fun.

cta.title: Ready to join the fun?
cta.subtitle: Create an account in seconds — free and built for friendly rivalry.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your email magic link.
Auth.checkEmailConfirmation: Check your email for the login link

LoginPage.title: Log in
LoginPage.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in.
LoginPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

SignupPage.title: Create your account
SignupPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
SignupPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
SignupPage.successMessage: We've sent you a verification email. Click the link to activate your account.
SignupPage.checkSpam: Check your spam/junk folder if you don't see it.

SetName.title: What should we call you?
SetName.subtitle: This name will appear on leaderboards and to other players.
SetName.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
SetName.tooLong: Name can't be longer than 30 characters.
SetName.timezonePreview: Right now it's {time} in your timezone

Profile.title: Your Profile
Profile.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
Profile.tooLong: Name can't be longer than 30 characters.
Profile.timezonePreview: Right now it's {time} in your timezone

CreateGroup.publicDescription: Anyone can find and join your group
CreateGroup.privateDescription: Only people with the invite link can join
CreateGroup.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe your group so others can find it
CreateGroup.groupDescriptionHelp: Max 200 characters. Shown on the discovery page.

AccessCode.title: Group access
AccessCode.openDescription: Anyone with the link can join
AccessCode.shareCodeHint: Share this code with your group members
AccessCode.confirmOpenSwitch: Are you sure? Anyone with the link will be able to join

Discover.title: Discover Worlds
Discover.subtitle: Find a group and start playing
Discover.noGroups: No public groups yet. Create your own!

create.title: Create group
create.subtitle: Set up your group scoring and invite your friends.

errors.memberSaveFailed: The group was created but we could not add you as a member. Try joining from the invite link or contact support.
errors.duplicateSlug: That group link is already taken. Change the slug to something unique (for example add a number or word).

Leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
Leaderboard.subtitle: Standings for {groupName}.
Leaderboard.empty: No leaderboard rows yet. Predictions will appear here after matches are scored.

Picks.title: Champion & More
Picks.subtitle: Pick your tournament winners before it starts
Picks.searchPlayer: Search or type a player name...
Picks.searchGoalkeeper: Search or type a goalkeeper name...
Picks.locked: Picks are locked — the tournament has started
Picks.error: Failed to save. Please try again.
Picks.noPlayerMatches: No matches — you can type a custom name

Predictions.title: Match predictions
Predictions.subtitle: Submit your picks for {groupName}.
Predictions.advancesIfNotDraw: Team that advances (not a draw after 90′)
Predictions.whoAdvances: Who advances if the score is a draw after 90 minutes?
Predictions.teamsTbd: Teams to be decided — enter your score once both sides are known.
Predictions.selectAdvances: Choose which team advances for drawn knockout scores.
Predictions.selectWinnerIfNotDraw: Choose which team advances when the score is not a draw.

Bracket.title: World Cup Bracket
Bracket.scrollHint: Scroll sideways to see the full bracket on desktop.

AdminPage.title: Admin Panel
AdminPage.confirmMessage: Mark {home} vs {away} as finished with score {homeScore}-{awayScore}? This will trigger scoring for all predictions.
AdminPage.success: Match result saved. Scores are being calculated.
AdminPage.error: Failed to save result. Please try again.
AdminPage.notAdmin: You are not the admin of this group.

email.title: Email tools
email.testNote: Sends reminders to players with pending predictions

knockout.sectionHint: Winner tokens (W-…) update the next match automatically after you save a result. Third place (L-…) must be set with Resolve teams.
knockout.selectAdvancing: Select who advances before marking finished.
knockout.bracketUpdated: The next bracket match was updated automatically.
knockout.drawPickAdvancing: Draw — pick which team advances (ET / pens).
